title: Mock interview: ML breadth + ML coding round
focus: 6 ML concept questions in 45 min + implement k-means or logreg in 30 min.

tracks.label: Mock · ML breadth + ML coding round

items.label: Breadth round: 6 ML concepts in 45 min
interviewQuestions: Pick 6 ML concept questions and time yourself for 7 min each.
Which concept did you fumble — and what's the cleaner 90-second answer you'd give next time?

items.label: ML coding: implement k-means or logistic regression in 30 min
interviewQuestions: Implement k-means with k-means++ in 30 minutes — and discuss complexity.
What edge cases (empty cluster, all points identical) did you handle, and how?
